title: Shower Curtains Mould Proof Resistant, EVA Waterproof Heavy Duty Bathroom Curtains with 5 Magnets, 180 x 180 cm, Cobblestone
features: ▲ Material: 100% Eco-friendly EVA, Waterproof, Non-toxic, Anti-bacterial, Mould-proof & Mildew resistant curtain for bathroom.
▲ Safe & Healthy for Bathroom Environment: Our No-toxic shower curtain is made of EVA material, softer, chlorine-free, PVC free, family-safe for your shower and tub environment.
▲ Standard shower curtain 180 x 180cm/Wide x Long/High. 72x72 inch ideal for most standard size bathrooms, shower/tub, It can be used shower curtain alone or as liner.

▲ Anti-Cling & Weighted Bottom: The heavy shower curtain add 5 bottom magnets reduce billowing, also won't stick to you when showering. 5 magnets along the bottom provide stability to keep the shower liner in place and avoid water splash out onto the floor.

▲ Resists Tearing and Rusting: Rust proof metal grommets and reinforced top header is durable and strong, protect the shower curtain or liner tearing and ensure long term use. See goodbye with the days of ripped hook holes. 12 free white plastic hooks are included.
description: Product Description EurCross is a professional shower curtain supplier, we are committed to providing customers with Safe, Healthy , Comfortable quality products and good shopping service. All our shower curtains or liners are made of harmless high-quality raw materials won't expose your family and the environment to harmful chemical fumes,good and safe for your family health perfect for every family choice. Thanks for your order! 3D Pebble Shower Curtain 3D attractive pebble design - Very modern and classy clear with 3D cobblestone design that allow enough light to come through to brighten your bathroom and more Spacious. The sunlight comes in and makes the shower curtain look glittery and bling-bling. Shower Curtain 180 x 180/W x H(L) Dimension：180 x 180cm/72 x 72inch / W x H(L). 12 metal eyelets & white plastic hooks. 5 magnets on the shower curtain bottom. Heavy fabric,100% EVA, Mold free 100% waterproof,can use the shower curtain in moisture-rich wet room. Clear patterns and transparent materials make the curtain change to translucent. More details Reinforced header & Rust proof metal grommets 12 Rust proof grommets protect liner from tearing on hooks.Helps the shower curtain last longer. The metal grommet holes promote easier hanging. Water proof & Easy Clean Waterproof keep the liner clean and fresh,anti mould for a safe shower and tub environment. With basic maintenance of wiping and rinsing and reduce embarrassing mildew buildup. 5 Bottom Maganets Featuring a perfectly weighted hem Provide weight and increased stability keep the shower curtain in place.Don't floating and stick to you. Easy install Fits many standard size bathroom shower or bath tub and works with straight or curved shower rods.
